name: Creole Potato Salad
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine minced green bell pepper, minced green onion, minced onion, a small clove of minced garlic, chopped celery, chopped parsley, and minced hot peppers.
2. Sprinkle the mixture with salt, salad oil, and 2 tablespoons vinegar; set aside to cool.
3. Scrub unpeeled potatoes and boil until soft. Peel, cut into bite-sized pieces, and place in a large bowl.
4. Separate egg yolks from egg whites. Chop the whites and add them to the potato mixture along with the marinated bell pepper mixture.
5. Mash the egg yolks with Worcestershire sauce, hot pepper sauce, and 1 tablespoon vinegar. Mix this with mayonnaise and gently fold into the potato mixture.
6. Mix the salad lightly but thoroughly.
